title: Rat Extermination in Longwood, Bronx | $350-$600
metaDescription: Professional rat extermination services in Longwood, Bronx. Licensed exterminators eliminate rat infestations fast. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Longwood residents face persistent rat problems due to the neighborhood's mix of older apartment buildings, commercial corridors, and proximity to transit hubs. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive rat extermination services throughout Longwood, from Southern Boulevard to the Intervale Avenue area. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of Bronx neighborhoods and deliver fast, effective rodent removal.
whyUs: We've served Longwood and the South Bronx for years, with deep knowledge of the building types and rat behavior patterns specific to this area. Our team offers same-day emergency service, uses safe and proven extermination methods, and provides thorough follow-up inspections to ensure rats don't return to your Longwood property.
localContext: Longwood's pre-war apartment buildings, busy commercial strips along Prospect Avenue and Southern Boulevard, and aging infrastructure create ideal conditions for rat infestations. The neighborhood's proximity to Crotona Park and densely packed residential blocks means rats can quickly spread between properties, making professional extermination essential for long-term control.

faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in Longwood typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Why are rats so common in Longwood apartments?
faqs.answer: Longwood has many pre-war buildings with aging plumbing, cracks in foundations, and gaps around utilities that rats exploit. Combined with high population density, nearby parks, and active commercial areas that provide food sources, rats find ideal conditions to thrive in this Bronx neighborhood.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in Longwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Longwood and the South Bronx. Our team understands that rat infestations require immediate attention, especially in residential buildings where health risks are a concern. Call us by noon for potential same-day service.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your rat extermination services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a service guarantee. After the initial treatment, we provide follow-up visits to ensure the infestation is completely eliminated and seal entry points to prevent future problems. If rats return within the guarantee period, we'll re-treat at no additional charge.
